recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
recommendations.overview: As a new school year begins, Greg is subject to relentless teasing from his brother Rodrick. Will Greg manage to get along with him? Or will a secret ruin everything?

recommendations.title: Orion and the Dark
recommendations.overview: A boy with an active imagination faces his fears on an unforgettable journey through the night with his new friend: a giant, smiling creature named Dark.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid

recommendations.title: Elio
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elio, a space fanatic with an active imagination, finds himself on a cosmic misadventure where he must form new bonds with eccentric alien lifeforms, navigate a crisis of intergalactic proportions and somehow discover who he is truly meant to be.
recommendations.director: Adrian Molina, Domee Shi, Madeline Sharafian

recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Family, Romance

recommendations.title: Candy Jar
recommendations.overview: Dueling high school debate champs who are at odds on just about everything forge ahead with ambitious plans to get into the colleges of their dreams.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
recommendations.overview: Wimpy Greg Heffley, now in seventh grade, thinks he has it all together. He has mastered middle school and gotten rid of the Cheese Touch. However, Greg's older brother, Rodrick, is itching to cut him down to size. He gets the perfect opportunity whe

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

recommendations.title: Piper
recommendations.overview: A mother bird tries to teach her little one how to find food by herself. In the process, she encounters a traumatic experience that she must overcome in order to survive.
